Name: UInterpData
Description:
Interpolation data, containing keyframe tracks, event tracks etc.
  This does not contain any  AActor  references or state, so can safely be stored in
  packages, shared between multiple MatineeActors etc.

Variables.Name: InterpLength
Variables.Description: Duration of interpolation sequence - in seconds.

Variables.Name: PathBuildTime
Variables.Description: Position in Interp to move things to for path-building in editor.

Variables.Name: InterpGroups
Variables.Description: Actual interpolation data. Groups of InterpTracks.

Variables.Name: CurveEdSetup
Variables.Description: Used for curve editor to remember curve-editing setup. Only loaded in editor.

Variables.Name: EdSectionStart
Variables.Description: Used in editor for defining sections to loop, stretch etc.

Variables.Name: EdSectionEnd
Variables.Description: Used in editor for defining sections to loop, stretch etc.

Variables.Name: bShouldBakeAndPrune
Variables.Description: If true, then the matinee should be baked and pruned at cook time.

Variables.Name: CachedDirectorGroup
Variables.Description: Cached version of the director group, if any, for easy access while in game

Variables.Name: AllEventNames
Variables.Description: Unique names of all events contained across all event tracks

Variables.Name: InterpFilters
Variables.Description: Used for filtering which tracks are currently visible.
